Subject: NCM-P-2025-10-14 Quorum Discontinues Bridge Loan Offering
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-10-14 08:44:02-07:00

 



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Effective October 23, 2025, Quorum Federal Credit Union will discontinue their Bridge Loan program. New applications will not be accepted after this date. Loans already submitted and in the Quorum pipeline will continue to be reviewed and purchased in accordance with existing guidelines. 

 

Bridge loans are available through our brokered partners- please see below for additional detail.
